item.title: Drata 摘要
item.description:
The author thanks Drata for sponsoring last week at DF. Drata's message emphasizes using autonomous AI agents to automate compliance, manage internal and third-party risk, and continuously prove security posture.
标签: sponsorship, Drata, AI agents, compliance, risk management, security, automation

item.title: How to be inspired without copying 摘要
item.description:
The article explores how true creative inspiration differs from surface-level imitation, using historical examples like Bach transcribing Vivaldi, Hunter S. Thompson typing out Fitzgerald, and Picasso reinterpreting Velázquez. It argues that good copying involves understanding underlying processes rather than mimicking visible features, and that originality emerges from the collision of diverse influences. The author warns against 'cargo cult' creativity and notes that AI now makes surface imitation easy, making deep understanding and judgment more valuable. True apprenticeship requires patient, deep engagement with source material over years.
标签: creativity, imitation, originality, influence, art, writing, music, learning, apprenticeship, AI
